overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious futuristic cyberpunk apartment featuring vibrant neon lighting in cyan and pink. The player character walks through a living room with bean bag chairs, enters a bathroom with a 'Bliss' neon sign, takes a shower with visible water effects, and then moves to an upper walkway with glass railings overlooking the city at night.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic cyberpunk living room illuminated by cyan neon strips. Pink bean bag chairs and a black leather chair with green accents furnish the space. The camera moves steadily forward and right, approaching a wall featuring a glowing pink 'JIG-JIG' neon sign and a metal locker covered in stickers.

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through a doorway into a dimly lit bathroom featuring a glowing cursive 'Bliss' neon sign on the wall. A potted palm plant sits near the entrance as the camera approaches a glass shower enclosure. The floor transitions to white tiles, and a wooden bench with towels is visible to the right.

segments.scene_description: Inside the glass shower stall, water streams down the doors while the character's hands press against the glass. The camera tilts upward to focus on the shower head as water splashes down, creating a dramatic close-up of the water droplets cascading in the dim lighting.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the bathroom through a doorway into a brighter space with large windows revealing a nighttime cityscape with yellow ambient lighting. A bed with white sheets is visible to the right as the camera moves toward an upper level walkway with glass railings.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an upper walkway with glass railings and cyan neon lighting, overlooking the lower level of the apartment. Large windows reveal the city outside while holographic displays and modern ceiling fixtures illuminate the space. The view looks down through the glass floor to the level below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit cyberpunk apartment that transitions from a cozy living area into a private bathroom before ascending to a high-altitude overlook of a futuristic city. It begins in a living room bathed in cyan neon, gliding past pink bean bag chairs and a glowing pink sign toward a doorway. As the camera passes through the entrance, the environment shifts into a dimly lit bathroom with white tiled floors and a cursive Bliss sign, eventually moving inside a glass shower where water streams down the panes and splashes from the shower head. The scene then opens into a brighter bedroom area with white sheets and large windows, before the camera climbs toward an upper walkway. Finally, the perspective moves along glass railings illuminated by cyan strips, looking down through a glass floor at the apartment below while the nighttime cityscape glows through the expansive windows.
